verses.king_james: Then answered Bildad the Shuhite, and said,

verses.latin_vulgate: Potestas et terror apud eum est,  qui facit concordiam in sublimibus suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַמְשֵׁ֣ל וָפַ֣חַד עִמּ֑וֹ עֹשֶׂ֥ה שָׁ֝ל֗וֹם בִּמְרוֹמָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: Dominion and fear are with him, he maketh peace in his high places.

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid est numerus militum ejus ?  et super quem non surget lumen illius ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֲיֵ֣שׁ מִ֭סְפָּר לִגְדוּדָ֑יו וְעַל־מִ֝֗י לֹא־יָק֥וּם אוֹרֵֽהוּ׃
verses.king_james: Is there any number of his armies? and upon whom doth not his light arise?

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid justificari potest homo comparatus Deo ?  aut apparere mundus natus de muliere ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמַה־יִּצְדַּ֣ק אֱנ֣וֹשׁ עִם־אֵ֑ל וּמַה־יִּ֝זְכֶּ֗ה יְל֣וּד אִשָּֽׁה׃
verses.king_james: How then can man be justified with God? or how can he be clean that is born of a woman?

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce luna etiam non splendet,  et stellæ non sunt mundæ in conspectu ejus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הֵ֣ן עַד־יָ֭רֵחַ וְלֹ֣א יַאֲהִ֑יל וְ֝כוֹכָבִ֗ים לֹא־זַכּ֥וּ בְעֵינָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: Behold even to the moon, and it shineth not; yea, the stars are not pure in his sight.

verses.latin_vulgate: quanto magis homo putredo,  et filius hominis vermis ?
verses.king_james: How much less man, that is a worm? and the son of man, which is a worm?
